entries.name: 3D Renders
entries.claude_prompt: Pick 3D render / claymorphism-style abstract assets — great for web3, landing heroes, and playful product pages.

entries.name: Abstract / Gradient backgrounds
entries.claude_prompt: Pick abstract/gradient hero backgrounds from Unsplash (search abstract-gradient, bokeh, mesh-gradient) or use CSS gradient generators.

entries.name: Analytics Dark Dashboard
entries.claude_prompt: Use analytics-dark template: sidebar + topbar + 4 KPI cards + chart placeholder + recent-activity table, dark slate theme.

entries.name: Anime.js
entries.claude_prompt: Use Anime.js: lightweight JS animation library with a timeline API. Framework-agnostic.

entries.name: Ant Design
entries.claude_prompt: Use Ant Design for enterprise/B2B dashboards: dense data tables, forms, complex controls. Theme via ConfigProvider.

entries.name: Architecture / Interiors
entries.claude_prompt: Pick architecture/interior photos — great for minimal, brutalist, real-estate, or editorial aesthetics.

entries.name: Arco Design
entries.claude_prompt: Use Arco Design: ByteDance enterprise-class React/Vue design system.

entries.name: Ark UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Ark UI: headless, multi-framework component primitives from the Chakra team (works in React, Vue, Solid).

entries.name: Astrofy
entries.claude_prompt: Use Astrofy: free Astro personal portfolio template with blog and projects.

entries.name: AutoAnimate
entries.claude_prompt: Use AutoAnimate: one-line hook/directive to add transitions to any framework (add, remove, reorder).

entries.name: awesome-css-in-js
entries.claude_prompt: Browse awesome-css-in-js for CSS-in-JS libraries and patterns.

entries.name: awesome-design-systems
entries.claude_prompt: Browse awesome-design-systems for a curated directory of design systems from across the industry.

entries.name: Awesome-Design-Tokens
entries.claude_prompt: Browse Awesome-Design-Tokens for design token tooling, specs, and W3C standards.

entries.name: awesome-react-components
entries.claude_prompt: Browse awesome-react-components for curated React UI and utility components.

entries.name: awesome-svelte
entries.claude_prompt: Browse awesome-svelte for Svelte/SvelteKit libraries and UI components.

entries.name: awesome-tailwindcss
entries.claude_prompt: Browse awesome-tailwindcss for plugins, templates, and Tailwind-related resources.

entries.name: awesome-vue
entries.claude_prompt: Browse awesome-vue (official) for Vue libraries, UI, and learning resources.

entries.name: awesome-web-components
entries.claude_prompt: Browse awesome-web-components for web components, tools, and frameworks (Lit, Stencil, etc.).

entries.name: Base UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Base UI: MUI team's unstyled, accessible React primitives.

entries.name: Bits UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Bits UI: headless Svelte primitives (the foundation under shadcn-svelte).

entries.name: Bootstrap
entries.claude_prompt: Use Bootstrap 5: class-based CSS framework, 12-column grid, native HTML components. No JS framework required.

entries.name: Bootstrap Icons
entries.claude_prompt: Use Bootstrap Icons: 2000+ SVG icons, works anywhere (no Bootstrap dependency required).

entries.name: Brutalism
entries.claude_prompt: Apply brutalism: thick 2-4px black borders, no rounded corners, hard shadows, raw system fonts mixed with monospace, saturated primaries on white or electric backgrounds, no gradients, deliberate typographic clash.

entries.name: Candy Pop
entries.claude_prompt: Use Candy Pop: bright saturated pink/yellow/green/blue/purple on cream. Kids, fun SaaS, event sites.

entries.name: Carbon Design System
entries.claude_prompt: Use Carbon Design System: IBM's enterprise-oriented design system for React (and vanilla).

entries.name: Catppuccin Mocha
entries.claude_prompt: Use Catppuccin Mocha: pastel-accent dark theme. Gentle contrast, candy-soft accents on espresso base.

entries.name: Chakra UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Chakra UI: style-props-based React components, strong dark mode, accessible defaults.

entries.name: Claymorphism
entries.claude_prompt: Apply claymorphism: chunky rounded corners (20-32px), two layered inset shadows for depth (one dark inner, one light inner at opposite corner), soft pastel backgrounds, thick padding, cartoony friendly feel.

entries.name: CoreUI Free React Admin Template
entries.claude_prompt: Use CoreUI free React admin template: Bootstrap-based React dashboard starter.

entries.name: Cyberpunk Neon
entries.claude_prompt: Use Cyberpunk Neon: near-black bg, electric magenta/cyan/yellow accents. Web3, gaming, edgy tech branding.

entries.name: daisyUI
entries.claude_prompt: Use daisyUI: Tailwind plugin that adds semantic classes (btn, card, modal) and 30+ themes. Works with any framework.

entries.name: Dracula
entries.claude_prompt: Use Dracula palette: deep navy-black background, off-white text, vivid purple/pink/green accents.

entries.name: Editorial Cream
entries.claude_prompt: Use Editorial Cream: warm ivory base, sepia rule lines, muted burgundy accent. Pairs with editorial-magazine style.

entries.name: Editorial Magazine
entries.claude_prompt: Apply editorial magazine style: elegant serif headlines (Playfair, GT Sectra, Canela), drop caps, long-form column layouts, image captions in italic small caps, soft cream background, generous line-height, rule lines between sections.

entries.name: Element Plus
entries.claude_prompt: Use Element Plus: Vue 3 UI library (successor to Element UI).

entries.name: Feather Icons
entries.claude_prompt: Use Feather icons: 280+ simply-drawn line-style SVG icons.

entries.name: Fintech Corporate
entries.claude_prompt: Use Fintech Corporate: deep navy + steel blue + near-white, with warm copper accent for CTAs. Trust, stability, finance.

entries.name: Fira Code
entries.claude_prompt: Use Fira Code: monospace font with extensive programming ligatures.

entries.name: Float UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Float UI: modern Tailwind + React components and templates.

entries.name: Flowbite
entries.claude_prompt: Use Flowbite: Tailwind CSS component library with interactive JS components, available for React, Vue, and Svelte.

entries.name: Fluent UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Fluent UI: Microsoft's Fluent Design components for React.

entries.name: Fontsource
entries.claude_prompt: Use Fontsource to self-host any open-source font via npm (@fontsource/<slug>). Tooling is MIT; each font retains its own license.

entries.name: Food / Drink
entries.claude_prompt: Pick food/drink photos for restaurant, cafe, delivery, or editorial food-blog projects.

entries.name: Forest
entries.claude_prompt: Use Forest: deep moss + sage + cream. Earthy wellness/outdoor brand aesthetic.

entries.name: Geist
entries.claude_prompt: Use Geist: Vercel's sans + mono typefaces, modern and geometric.

entries.name: Glassmorphism
entries.claude_prompt: Apply glassmorphism: translucent white/dark panels with backdrop-filter blur(20px), subtle 1px inner border, colorful blurred shapes behind panels, soft large radii (16-24px), subtle shadows.

entries.name: Google Fonts (collection)
entries.claude_prompt: Browse Google Fonts repo for 1500+ open-source typefaces. Per-font license varies (mostly OFL, some Apache-2.0 / UFL) — check each.

entries.name: Gruvbox Dark
entries.claude_prompt: Use Gruvbox Dark: warm brown-olive background with retro autumnal accents.

entries.name: Headless UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Headless UI: unstyled, accessible React/Vue components from Tailwind Labs. Pair with Tailwind for styling.

entries.name: Hero — Tech / Office
entries.claude_prompt: Pick a hero photo for a SaaS/tech landing page — browse Unsplash /t/technology, /t/business-work, or Pexels /search/office.

entries.name: Heroicons
entries.claude_prompt: Use Heroicons by Tailwind Labs: outline, solid, and mini variants. Install via @heroicons/react or @heroicons/vue.

entries.name: HeroUI (formerly NextUI)
entries.claude_prompt: Use HeroUI: React + Tailwind + React Aria components with a modern, colorful aesthetic.

entries.name: HyperUI
entries.claude_prompt: Use HyperUI: free collection of copy-paste Tailwind components and blocks.

entries.name: IBM Plex
entries.claude_prompt: Use IBM Plex: corporate-grade sans/serif/mono family. Great for technical and enterprise branding.

entries.name: Iconoir
entries.claude_prompt: Use Iconoir: 1500+ free SVG icons, zero dependencies, no tracking.

entries.name: Inter
entries.claude_prompt: Use Inter: variable-axis sans-serif designed for UI. System-font-like but better legibility at small sizes.

entries.name: JetBrains Mono
entries.claude_prompt: Use JetBrains Mono: developer-focused monospace with programming ligatures.

entries.name: Kobalte
entries.claude_prompt: Use Kobalte: headless, accessible SolidJS component library (the Solid equivalent of Radix).

entries.name: Lineicons
entries.claude_prompt: Use Lineicons: free line-style icon pack.

entries.name: Lottie Web
entries.claude_prompt: Use Lottie Web to render After Effects animations as SVG or Canvas on the web.

entries.name: Lucide
entries.claude_prompt: Use Lucide icons: actively-maintained Feather fork, 1500+ line-style SVGs. Install via lucide-react / lucide-vue / etc.

entries.name: Mantine
entries.claude_prompt: Use Mantine: 100+ React components plus @mantine/hooks and @mantine/form. Strong defaults, dark mode.

entries.name: Mantis Free React Admin
entries.claude_prompt: Use Mantis Free React Admin: MUI-based React admin dashboard template.

entries.name: Material Indigo
entries.claude_prompt: Use Material Indigo: Google's classic indigo scale (50-900) + pink accent #FF4081 + neutral #212121.

entries.name: Material Symbols / Icons
entries.claude_prompt: Use Material Symbols: Google's variable-font icon system (fill, weight, grade, optical size axes).

entries.name: Material Tailwind
entries.claude_prompt: Use Material Tailwind: Material Design-inspired Tailwind components for React and HTML.

entries.name: Material UI (MUI)
entries.claude_prompt: Use MUI (Material UI): Google's Material Design in React. Theme via createTheme; components via @mui/material.

entries.name: Melt UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Melt UI: headless, accessible Svelte component builders (the builder API under Bits UI).

entries.name: Meraki UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Meraki UI: Tailwind components with full RTL support.

entries.name: Minimal / Swiss
entries.claude_prompt: Apply Swiss/minimal style: strict 12-column grid, generous whitespace, Helvetica or Inter, black on white with one accent color, no decorative elements, asymmetric balance, hierarchy via type size only.

entries.name: Monochrome
entries.claude_prompt: Use Monochrome: pure grayscale steps. Pairs with Swiss/editorial/brutalism styles. Add at most one accent.

entries.name: Motion (Framer Motion)
entries.claude_prompt: Use Motion (formerly Framer Motion): production-ready React animation library with layout animations and gestures.

entries.name: Motion One
entries.claude_prompt: Use Motion One: tiny Web Animations API wrapper (~4kb) for any framework.

entries.name: Naive UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Naive UI: Vue 3, TypeScript-first component library with strong theming.

entries.name: Nature / Landscapes
entries.claude_prompt: Pick nature/landscape photos from Unsplash /t/nature, /t/wallpapers, or Pexels /search/nature for editorial and travel heroes.

entries.name: Neo-Brutalism
entries.claude_prompt: Apply neo-brutalism: 2-3px black borders, hard offset shadows, pastel backgrounds (mint, peach, periwinkle), rounded but small radius (4-8px), chunky sans-serif, friendly not aggressive.

entries.name: Next.js shadcn Dashboard Starter
entries.claude_prompt: Use next-shadcn-dashboard-starter: modern Next.js 14 + shadcn/ui admin dashboard starter.

entries.name: Next.js Commerce
entries.claude_prompt: Use Next.js Commerce: Vercel's high-performance e-commerce template (Shopify backend by default).

entries.name: Nord
entries.claude_prompt: Use Nord palette: Arctic-inspired cool blues on deep slate. Bg #2E3440, fg #D8DEE9, accent #88C0D0.

entries.name: Nuxt UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Nuxt UI: Tailwind + Headless UI components optimized for Nuxt.

entries.name: Ocean
entries.claude_prompt: Use Ocean: deep navy to light aqua. Cool, calm, trust-building. Good for fintech, healthcare, tech-enterprise.

entries.name: One Dark
entries.claude_prompt: Use One Dark (Atom): slate background, cool pastel accents. Widely-loved editor theme.

entries.name: Park UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Park UI: Ark UI (framework-agnostic primitives) + Panda CSS recipes. Works in React, Vue, Solid.

entries.name: Pastel Dream
entries.claude_prompt: Use Pastel Dream: soft rose/butter/mint/sky/lavender. Neo-brutalism and playful SaaS brand friendly.

entries.name: People / Portraits
entries.claude_prompt: Pick portraits / team photos from Unsplash /t/people or Pexels /search/portrait for avatars, testimonials, about pages.

entries.name: Phosphor Icons
entries.claude_prompt: Use Phosphor icons: flexible icon family with 6 weights (thin, light, regular, bold, fill, duotone).

entries.name: Polaris
entries.claude_prompt: Use Shopify Polaris: React component library for merchant-facing admin UI.

entries.name: Preline UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Preline UI: open-source Tailwind CSS components and Tailwind plugin.

entries.name: Pricing Table (3-tier)
entries.claude_prompt: Use pricing-table component: 3 tiers with middle plan highlighted, vanilla CSS (no framework), responsive.

entries.name: Primer
entries.claude_prompt: Use Primer React: GitHub's design system components.

entries.name: PrimeReact
entries.claude_prompt: Use PrimeReact: rich component library (90+ components) with many built-in themes. PrimeVue and PrimeNG are siblings.

entries.name: E-commerce Product Shots
entries.claude_prompt: Pick product shots for e-commerce templates — Unsplash product-photography search or Pexels product/apparel searches.

entries.name: Quasar
entries.claude_prompt: Use Quasar: Vue-based framework targeting SPA, PWA, SSR, mobile, and Electron from a single codebase.

entries.name: Radix Icons
entries.claude_prompt: Use Radix Icons: crisp 15x15 icons, ideal for dense UIs and inline text.

entries.name: Radix UI
entries.claude_prompt: Use Radix UI primitives: unstyled, accessible React components (Dialog, Popover, Select, etc.). Bring your own styles.

entries.name: React Aria / React Spectrum
entries.claude_prompt: Use React Aria: Adobe's accessibility-first React hooks and primitives. React Spectrum is the styled reference implementation.

entries.name: Remix Icon
entries.claude_prompt: Use Remix Icon: neutral-style open-source icons with matched line/fill pairs.

entries.name: Retro Terminal
entries.claude_prompt: Apply retro terminal: monospace only (IBM Plex Mono or VT323), phosphor green or amber on near-black, optional CRT scanlines via repeating linear-gradient, blinking block cursor, ASCII-art headings, no images.

entries.name: Rosé Pine
entries.claude_prompt: Use Rosé Pine: muted dark violet base with rosewater, iris, and foam accents. Soft and editorial.

entries.name: SaaS Minimal Landing
entries.claude_prompt: Use saas-minimal template as a starting point: hero + 3-feature grid + pricing + CTA, Tailwind CDN, black-on-white minimal aesthetic.

entries.name: Semi Design
entries.claude_prompt: Use Semi Design: Douyin/TikTok modern React design system with strong theming.

entries.name: shadcn/ui
entries.claude_prompt: Use shadcn/ui: Radix primitives + Tailwind, components are copied into the project (not imported), CSS variables for theming, composable.

entries.name: Simple Icons
entries.claude_prompt: Use Simple Icons for brand logos (GitHub, Figma, npm, etc.) — single-color SVGs of popular brands.

entries.name: Skeleton
entries.claude_prompt: Use Skeleton: Svelte + Tailwind UI toolkit with themes.

entries.name: Skeuomorphic
entries.claude_prompt: Apply skeuomorphism: realistic gradients simulating bevels, textured backgrounds (linen, felt, leather), inner highlights and outer shadows to suggest depth, controls that look like physical objects.

entries.name: Soft UI Dashboard Tailwind
entries.claude_prompt: Use Soft UI Dashboard Tailwind: Tailwind-based admin template with soft-UI aesthetic.

entries.name: Solarized Dark
entries.claude_prompt: Use Solarized Dark: deep teal background with same accent hues as Solarized Light, tuned for dark UIs.

entries.name: Solarized Light
entries.claude_prompt: Use Solarized Light: warm ivory base #FDF6E3 with muted blue/ochre accents. Designed for high contrast without harshness.

entries.name: Sunset
entries.claude_prompt: Use Sunset: warm coral/peach/gold gradient palette. Great for landing-page heroes and wellness/travel brands.

entries.name: Tabler
entries.claude_prompt: Use Tabler as a Bootstrap-based admin dashboard template with a clean, responsive design.

entries.name: Tabler Icons
entries.claude_prompt: Use Tabler Icons: 4000+ free SVG icons, consistent 24x24 grid.

entries.name: Tailblocks
entries.claude_prompt: Use Tailblocks: ready-to-use Tailwind CSS blocks with color theme swapping.

entries.name: Tailwind Slate
entries.claude_prompt: Use Tailwind Slate 50-950: neutral UI grayscale leaning slightly cool. Safe default background/text scale for any app.

entries.name: Tailwind CSS Animate
entries.claude_prompt: Use tailwindcss-animate: Tailwind plugin adding animation utilities (used internally by shadcn/ui).

entries.name: Taxonomy (shadcn/ui example app)
entries.claude_prompt: Use Taxonomy as a Next.js 13 app-router SaaS example built with shadcn/ui.

entries.name: TDesign
entries.claude_prompt: Use TDesign: Tencent's enterprise design system with React, Vue, and mobile bindings.

entries.name: Textures / Patterns
entries.claude_prompt: Pick textures/patterns for grain overlays, paper backgrounds, or subtle section fills.

entries.name: Tokyo Night
entries.claude_prompt: Use Tokyo Night: deep violet-navy background with neon blue/purple/coral accents. Contemporary developer aesthetic.

entries.name: Tremor
entries.claude_prompt: Use Tremor: React components for dashboards and analytics (charts, KPI cards, tables) built on Tailwind.

entries.name: Vue Element Admin
entries.claude_prompt: Use vue-element-admin as a Vue 2 admin dashboard template reference.

entries.name: Vue Vben Admin
entries.claude_prompt: Use vue-vben-admin as a modern Vue 3 + Vite + TS admin framework.

entries.name: Vuetify
entries.claude_prompt: Use Vuetify: Material Design component framework for Vue 3.
